name: KANSAI NEROLAC PAI
summary: KANSAI NEROLAC PAINTS LIMITED is one of the leading paint companies in India and a subsidiary of Kansai Paint Co., Ltd., Japan. The company manufactures and markets a wide range of decorative and industrial paints, coatings and related products with headquarters located in Mumbai, India. They serve diverse customer segments, including automotive, construction, and general industrial sectors.
